title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 7: The Death of Enkidu
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 7 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Enkidu falls ill and dies, and Gilgamesh's heart is broken.
introduction: Tablet 7 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Enkidu falls ill and dies, and Gilgamesh's heart is broken.

translation.text: Enkidu lay down, and his heart was still. Gilgamesh wept over him: 'My friend, the swift mule, the wild ass of the mountain — what is this sleep that has seized you?'
